@graph.name: Income Tax Services in Madhya Pradesh | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Income Tax Services in Madhya Pradesh. From ₹1,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Income tax return filing (ITR-1 to ITR-7), tax planning, not. Contact +91 99622

mainEntity.name: Which ITR form should I file?

acceptedAnswer.text: ITR-1 for salaried (up to ₹50L), ITR-2 for capital gains/multiple properties, ITR-3 for business income, ITR-4 for presumptive taxation.

mainEntity.name: What is the due date for ITR filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: 31st July for individuals (non-audit), 31st October for audit cases, 30th November for transfer pricing.

mainEntity.name: Can you represent me in income tax appeals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle CIT(A) appeals, ITAT appeals, Section 264 revisions, and settlement commission applications.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide income tax services services in Madhya Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Madhya Pradesh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Madhya Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Madhya Pradesh fall under ROC Gwalior. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Madhya Pradesh-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Madhya Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Madhya Pradesh: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
